mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, background_img, business_registration_num, br_file, phone_num, address, address_detail, postcode, latitude, longitude, description, file, facility, approval_status, gym_code, bank_name, account_number FROM GYM WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, name, background_img, phone_num, address, latitude, longitude, description, facility, approval_status, gym_code FROM GYM WHERE approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, name, address, address_detail, postcode, background_img, latitude, longitude, facility, approval_status FROM GYM
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GYM ( user_id, name, phone_num, address, address_detail, postcode, latitude, longitude, approval_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{phoneNum}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{postcode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE GYM SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE GYM SET name = #{name}, phone_num = #{phoneNum}, address = #{address}, description = #{description}, facility = #{facility}, bank_name = #{bankName}, account_number = #{accountNumber} WHERE id = #{id}
